query:
SELECT codigoCetip, rating, indexador, CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as zspread, isOutlier
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE rating = 'AAA.br' AND indexador = 'DI SPREAD'
AND dataReferencia = (SELECT MAX(dataReferencia) FROM spread_analysis)
ORDER BY CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4)) DESC
LIMIT 10;
